events.name: Japan Industrial Production (M-o-M) (Dec)
events.description: Measures the change in the total value of output produced by manufacturers, mines, and utilities in Japan.

events.name: Eurozone Industrial Production (M-o-M) (Dec)
events.description: Measures the change in the total inflation-adjusted value of output produced by manufacturers, mines, and utilities.

events.name: UK Unemployment Rate (Dec)
events.description: The percentage of the total workforce that is unemployed and actively seeking employment during the previous month.

events.name: Canada CPI (M-o-M) (Jan)
events.description: Measures the change in the price of goods and services from the perspective of the Canadian consumer.

events.name: UK CPI (Y-o-Y) (Jan)
events.description: The primary indicator of inflation in the UK, measuring price changes for a basket of consumer goods.

events.name: US FOMC Meeting Minutes
events.description: A detailed record of the Fed's most recent interest rate meeting, providing insights into future monetary policy.

events.name: Australia Employment Change (Jan)
events.description: Measures the change in the number of employed people, reflecting the health of the Australian labor market.

events.name: US Initial Jobless Claims
events.description: Measures the number of individuals who filed for unemployment insurance for the first time during the past week.

events.name: US GDP (Q-o-Q) (Q4)
events.description: The 'Advance' estimate of the annualized growth rate of the US economy for the final quarter of 2025.

events.name: US Core PCE Price Index (Y-o-Y) (Dec)
events.description: The Fed's preferred inflation gauge, measuring price changes in personal consumption expenditures excluding food and energy.
